Please choose one: (A) sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity/conciseness (R1.6), (B) strengthen the argument and section structure at the subsection/section level (R1.1, R1.2, R1.5), (C) check that claims align with the reported evidence and metrics (R1.3), or (D) assess novelty vs. prior work and suggest citations to position the contribution (R1.4, R1.7).",

parsed.clarification_question: Which type of help do you want for this section? Please choose one: (A) sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity/conciseness (R1.6), (B) strengthen the argument and section structure at the subsection/section level (R1.1, R1.2, R1.5), (C) check that claims align with the reported evidence and metrics (R1.3), or (D) assess novelty vs. prior work and suggest citations to position the contribution (R1.4, R1.7).

rationale.RX.1: The request is underspecified, so we must surface uncertainties about the intended scope and limits of the assistance.
rationale.RX.2: We should avoid amplifying claims beyond what the text reports (e.g., generalizing failure rates beyond the 8 PDEs and 1,200 runs).
rationale.RX.3: Support must remain confined to the provided section and not introduce new analyses, experiments, or external results.
rationale.RX.4: We should avoid guidance that could encourage misuse or overconfident application of the taxonomy (e.g., premature termination policies without validation).
rationale.RX.5: Any subsequent guidance should be traceable to specific sentences or claims in the provided excerpt and clearly separate assumptions from text-derived points.
